calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Roger Rubin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Andrew B. Smith.
No appearance by the Defendant: Mark Anthon Barquera.
09:35 a.m.- While court is in session, an UNFILED Declaration of Peter Chao, Esq. in support of continuaning trial, was drop off at the clerk's desk in the court room, copy was presented to Mr. Rubin.
Proper notice of TRIAL date by the Court's clerk, mailed to the same address as the one in the Declaration received in court today, the Court proceeds with the Prove-Up Hearing.
09:40 a.m.. - Mr. Smith was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Secured Property Tax Bills 2002-2003 and 2003-2004--------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - One page with two photographs------------------------------ ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #3 - 5 day notice----------------------------------------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 647 24th Ave., San Francisco, CA.
Costs Pursuant to memo of costs.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

P.M.- Association of Counsel with Consent of Party, Memorandum of Costs and Judgment submitted by Mr. Rubin.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
